narrative:
Precinct New Phila 4-A (precinct in Tuscarawas County) has 627 registered voters, with 45.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 25.7%, a modest Republican lean of 2.9 percentage points.
